issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Examples are limited to Node.js and React, not all listed languages.

scenarios.name: Server-side 10% rollout of a new dashboard in Node.js
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @launchdarkly/node-server-sdk with waitForInitialization, the kind:'user' context, client.variation with a meaningful default for unreachable-LD fallback, and the 10→25→50→100 dashboard rollout plus kill switch; baseline uses the older SDK and skips the context kind.

scenarios.name: React A/B test on checkout flow for pro-plan users
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wraps with withLDProvider + kind:'user' context, reads useFlags, and recommends a multivariate flag with plan-attribute targeting plus a kill switch and meaningful default per the guidelines; baseline uses a boolean flag without multivariate or plan targeting.
